What We Offer

Smarter Ways to Stock Your Break Room

We bring the right solution for your space — whether that's cutting-edge AI technology or a dependable classic machine. Equipment is placed at no cost to you.

Most Popular

AI Smart Cooler

Our flagship HAHA AI Smart Cooler uses built-in vision technology to let shoppers grab what they want and simply walk away. No buttons, no cash — just open, take, and go. Perfect for offices, warehouses, and apartment buildings.

Built-in AI cameras ensure every transaction is captured automatically
Accepts all payment types including contactless and mobile pay
Real-time inventory monitoring — we restock before you run out
Zero cost to your business — no fees, no maintenance burden

Traditional Vending

The reliable workhorse. Our modern vending machines are stocked with a curated mix of snacks and beverages tailored to your team's preferences. Trusted, proven, and hassle-free.

Snack and beverage machines — or combined units
Card, cash, and mobile payment ready
Regularly serviced and restocked by our team
No upfront cost or monthly fees for qualifying locations

Micro Market

An open-concept grab-and-go market right in your break room. Fresh food, refrigerated items, and a wide product selection — ideal for larger locations with 200+ employees.

Fresh, refrigerated, and shelf-stable items all in one spot
Self-checkout kiosk with flexible payment options
Significantly more SKUs than a traditional vending setup

Coffee Service

Keep your team caffeinated with a full-service coffee program. From single-cup brewers to bean-to-cup office machines, we handle the equipment, supplies, and maintenance.

Premium single-cup and commercial machines available
Coffee, creamers, and supplies fully stocked by us
Pairs perfectly with a smart cooler or vending machine

Why Choose Us

The Georgia Vending Difference

We're not a faceless national chain. We're your neighbors — and we treat every account like it's our only one.

01
No Cost to You
Equipment placement, installation, and service are provided at zero cost for qualifying locations. We earn when you earn.
02
Locally Owned & Operated
We're an Atlanta family business. When you call, you reach us — not a national call center. Fast response, personal service.
03
Technology-Forward
Our AI smart coolers use vision technology to track every transaction and give you real-time data — a capability traditional vending simply can't match.
04
Custom Product Mix
We don't stock a generic mix and walk away. We tailor products to your workforce and adjust based on what's actually selling.
Family Owned & Operated
Proudly Serving Atlanta

Our Story

A Local Business Built on Service

Georgia Vending Solutions is a family-owned and operated business rooted right here in the Atlanta area. We started this company because we believed businesses in our community deserved a vending partner who actually cared — one who shows up reliably, stocks what people want, and treats every client like a long-term relationship.

As a local operation, we're invested in Atlanta's growth. From large warehouses and corporate offices to apartment communities and everything in between, we bring the right solution for each unique space. We take pride in offering the latest technology — like our AI smart coolers — alongside the proven reliability of traditional vending.

When you work with us, you're not a ticket number. You're a neighbor.
